series_metadata.series_description: This record series consists of requests to join the agency''s or statewide voluntary exclusion program.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper copy until converted to electronic format. Once machine-readable version is verified as an accurate copy, shred paper copies. ; Electronic: Retain for one year after an individual''s removal from the agency''s or statewide voluntary exclusion program, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
